stage: Stage 3.2 / Language authority and mojibake filter spinoff

language_and_encoding_policy.pdf_exception: PDF attachments may be ignored when present, but this taskpack contains no PDF
language_and_encoding_policy.localization_exception: Future localization resources are allowed only in explicit controlled localization folders

problem_statement.root_issue: Mixed-language internal task artifacts and encoding corruption can confuse agents, reports, validators, and owner-visible documents.
observed_incidents: Mojibake appeared when mixed-language taskpack content was opened in document viewers.
UTF-8 BOM broke Python JSON parsing during Astronomicon intake bootstrap.
Owner-facing Russian is useful in runtime live status, but it must be authorized by Officio rather than embedded ad hoc inside canonical task files.
problem_statement.goal: Make language behavior explicit, enforce English-only canonical artifacts, and give Inquisition a strong repository-wide mojibake and encoding filter.
